steps.title: Sort the data and identify the two middle values
steps.content:
The data set is: 4, 10, 18, 4, 4, 5, 6, 5
Sorted: 4, 4, 4, 5, 5, 6, 10, 18
With 8 values, the middle positions (4th and 5th) are both 5.

steps.title: Calculate the median
steps.content:
The median of an even-sized data set is the average of the two middle values.
$$\text{Median} = \frac{5 + 5}{2} = 5$$
That is the correct answer.
